## Docs Change

- What docs were updated?
- Why were they wrong/missing?

## Accuracy Checklist

- [ ] Matches current code behavior
- [ ] Commands/paths verified
- [ ] Links/screenshots updated (if needed)
- [ ] `npm run docs:typecheck` (if Docusaurus source changed)
- [ ] `npm run docs:check-links` (if links/content changed materially)
